name: BeyondSpring Inc.
summary: BeyondSpring Inc. (BYSI) is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing innovative cancer therapies. The company's pipeline includes plinabulin, a novel anticancer agent being developed for multiple oncology indications. BeyondSpring conducts clinical trials and research aimed at bringing new treatments to patients with unmet medical needs in oncology.
